appraisal_events.evidence: « Je déjeune justement demain avec le Préfet de police à l'Élysée. » / « Oui, chez M. Grévy, » et Swann est « un peu gêné de l'effet que sa phrase avait produit. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann’s mention of dining at the Élysée with high officials reveals elite associations that the group registers as impressive, heightening his local prestige.

status_effects.explanation: His elite connections are exposed and socially registered, boosting his perceived status despite his slight embarrassment.
